title: 12 PCS Feather Teaser Cat Toy, 2 Pcs Retractable Interactive Cat Teaser Rods, 10 Pcs Replacement Colorful Feather Refills with Bells, Feather Dangler Funny Exercise for Indoor Cat Kitten Catcher
features: 【Interactive and Exercising】 This feather cat wand has bells, they can keep the cat's attention and make your kitten flip, jump, chase and do more funny exercise, which can keep agility and healthy. This interactive cat rod can strengthen the trust and companionship between cats and owner.

【Multiple Teasers】 This cat toy set includes 2 rods and 10 replacement colourful feather refills with bells. You can change the teaser’s head easily to make more fun and happier for your cats. Feather will swirls when playing it with cats. Your cats will fall in love with it.

【High Quality and Safety】 This retractable cat teaser toy is made from eco-friendly material feathers, which all dyes are non-toxic nature and safe. Cat teaser wand's quality is upgraded, which is thicker and more flexible, not easily broke and more durable.

【Thoughtful Design】 The foam handle of the cat wand is soft and comfortable.The length of the dangler can be adjusted to a maximum of 38 in/96cm, which can keep kid's fingers far away from sharp claws of an activity cat.

【Retractable and Flexible】 This interactive cat wand can extend from 14.5 in/36cm to 38 in/96cm easily. It is flexible and durable which can extend to 3 overparticular for teasing. The rod extends out and locks into place. It is easy to store because it can retracted to smaller size after playing.
description: Why You Choose Our Interactive Cat Teaser Toy Wand? 1.This feather cat toy is a great way to interact with your pets. It can make your kitten do funny exercise and increase agility and healthy. 2.This cat toy set includes 2 rods and 10 attachments. The replacement colourful feather refills with bells keep cat’s fresh interests. 3.Upgraded wand, which is thicker and flexible. They are made from eco-friendly non-toxic material feathers, high quality and safe. 4. This interactive cat wand can extend from 14.5 in/36cm to 38 in/96cm easily. Keep kid's fingers far away from sharp claws. 5. It can retracted to smaller size after playing for easy storage. Specifications Material: Carbon fiber + EVA handle Product Size: Retractable 38 inch/96cm Notes 1.Do not leave children or cats alone with this toy. 2.Keep the toy in a safe place which is out of reach of children and pets. Package Included 5 × feather refills 4 × replacement worms 1 × furry trail 2 × flexible cat wands
